K_matrix: R^{m x m} sparse m unique entities, 50,091 papers May-Dec2023 + refs
EL: BLINK linker Wu et al 2020 off-the-shelf, titles+abstracts only
example_build: Consider all pairs {ei,ej} C(|E|,2) counts co-occurrence + single counts
retrieval_Eq1: Ret({l0..ln};K)=argmax_{I subset [m]:|I|=k} prod P(ei|E_{l0..ln}) ei not in E
retrieval_Eq2: argmax prod (prod_{ej in E} P(ej|ei)) * P(ei) from normalized K
alternative_embedding: cosine similarity in linker latent space, highest similarity to current literature entities, comparable results Table5
